proxies:
  - name: "vless-reality"
    type: vless
    server: 1.2.3.4
    port: 443
    uuid: "test-uuid-1234"
    network: tcp
    tls: true
    reality-opts:
      public-key: "testkey123"
      short-id: "abcd"
    servername: example.com

  - name: "hy2-main"
    type: hysteria2
    server: 1.2.3.4
    port: 8443
    password: "testpass"
    alpn:
      - h3

  - name: "awg-my-router"
    type: wireguard
    server: 1.2.3.4
    port: 51820
    private-key: "testprivkey"
    public-key: "testpubkey"
    ip: "10.0.0.2"

---
proxy-groups:
  - name: auto
    type: url-test
